description: Style NoteBright and colourful T-shirts from Kids Ville with vibrant prints keep your girl comfortable and trendy this summer. An easy favourite, your kids are sure to win compliments with these tees! Product DetailsPink T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print in frontMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warmUse only non chlorine bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron if needed do no iron on print or decorations
